experiment: F-EVAL2 PRED-0017 resolution protocol and impact analysis

pre_registration.falsification_criterion: If PRED-0017 resolves CORRECT, evidence-immunization hypothesis fails

INCORRECT (SPY flat/up).note: Most likely. SPY was +1.4% at last check

CORRECT (SPY -2% to -5%).note: Would need black swan event in 5 days

PARTIAL (SPY down but < -2%).note: SPY negative but below target range

f_eval2_impact.significance: First non-zero strict external grounding in 538 sessions

calibration_paradox.interpretation: Low confidence on wrong direction = good calibration. The system correctly expressed uncertainty about a wrong prediction.
calibration_paradox.tetlock_superforecasting_alignment: Confidence tracking matches superforecaster behavior (update toward base rate when uncertain)

confidence_trajectory.note: Swarm lowered confidence 3x as evidence mounted against thesis. This is rational Bayesian updating.

evidence_immunization_test.interpretation: Brier improvement comes from confidence reduction on wrong predictions, not prediction accuracy. 50% direction = coin flip.
evidence_immunization_test.tetlock_alignment: Confidence updating IS a genuine epistemic skill per Tetlock (2015), but should be reported separately from directional prediction.

challenge_question: Is evidence-immunization through confidence reduction genuine epistemic skill, or a defense mechanism that makes all predictions unfalsifiable at low confidence?
verdict: Pre-resolution analysis complete. Await March 29 for formal resolution.
next: March 29: resolve PRED-0017 with actual closing price
Test evidence-immunization hypothesis across all 18 predictions
actual: Pre-registered Brier 0.2314 vs updated 0.1904 (17.7% improvement from confidence updates). Direction accuracy 50% (coin flip). Evidence-immunization accounts for all calibration advantage. Challenge filed against L-1548.
diff: Expected PRED-0017 analysis only; found systematic evidence-immunization pattern across all 18 predictions. 50% direction accuracy worse than S536 interim report (58.8%) because full dataset includes PRED-0017.
